calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Termination Of The Estate
Off Calendar Jan-27-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person.

The court advises that it intends to issue an order that this estate be closed for lack of assets, as set forth in the Order to Show Cause issued by the court on Dec-06-2024.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-27-2025 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Termination Of The Estate
Off Calendar Dec-02-2024 Continued To Jan-27-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: none.

The court noted the absence of Petitioner Sara Chiabai and that there have been no recent updates submitted to the court. The court determined that probate may no longer be necessary as most assets pass by beneficiary designation. An Order to Appear will be issued to the Executor Sara Chiabai to appear on January 27, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204 and show cause why estate should not be closed due to lack of assets.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Nov-18-2024 Off Calendar

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Aug-26-2024 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Termination Of The Estate
Off Calendar Aug-26-2024 Continued To Dec-02-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Sara Chiabai appeared by zoom in propria persona.

Mrs. Chiabai apologized to the court for missing the last hearing and stated that she had an emergency. Mrs. Chaibai also stated that she is working with Wells Fargo to establish a separate money market account so that when the stocks are sold, the assets are moved into that main account, that once that is done, she won't have a need to show documents to anyone and that she does not think she gave them a small estate affidavit. Status of the inventory and appraisal, and the order to appear are off calendar. Status on termination of the estate is continued to December 2, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Nguyen. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing An Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Aug-26-2024 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Termination Of The Estate
Off Calendar Jul-08-2024 Continued To Aug-26-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Executor Sara Chiabai to appear on August 26, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why she failed to appear, and why the inventory and appraisal, and a petition to terminate the estate have not been filed. The status hearings are also continued to that date.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing An Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Jul-08-2024 Continued To Aug-26-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar May-20-2024 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing An Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar May-20-2024 Continued To Jul-08-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Sara Chiabai appeared by zoom in propria persona.

Mrs. Chiabai apologized for the non-appearance, stated that her aunt was sick for a really long time, that her aunt didn't own any real property or a car, that her only items of value are an i-pad and some Giants memorabilia, and that she is the sole heir and she wants to distribute the cash amongst her cousins. The court noted that the value of the estate is somewhere between $100,000.00 and $400,000.00. Mrs. Chiabai stated that she was the named beneficiary of the 401k and that there is $121,000.00 in the estate. The court stated that the assets are under the probate threshold and raised the issue of there being other documents that can be used and that perhaps Mrs. Chiabai can speak with Mr. Wrobel. Status on filing of the inventory and appraisal is continued to July 8, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Status on termination of the estate is also set for that date. The order to appear is off calendar.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing An Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Apr-15-2024 Continued To May-20-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Executor to appear on May 20, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why she failed to appear and why the inventory and appraisal has not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing An Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Feb-05-2024 Continued To Apr-15-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-02-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated September 15, 2020, is admitted to probate. Sara Chibhai is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $20,000.00. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on filing an inventory and appraisal it's set for February 5th 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in dept. 204. Status on close of estate is set for November 18, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status on administration is filed two weeks prior to the hearing date, the status hearing will go off calendar. Michael Kasolas is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Ross Moody: Clerk: A. Datt: Deputy: Carbona: Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-11-2023 Continued To Oct-02-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-14-2023 Continued To Sep-11-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Sara Chaiabai appearing via zoom for (pro per).

Mrs. Chaiabai stated that she has retained counsel Thomas Wrobel and he will make it to the next hearing. Petition of probate of will and letters testamentary is continued to September 11, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Cecilia Castellanos. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.
